name: Swiss Asparagus Au Gratin Drnd29a
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Kraft Touch of Butter Spread (melted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Bring 1/2 cup water to a boil in a 10-inch skillet. Add asparagus and cook for 2 minutes. Drain the asparagus, which will still be crisp.
3. Place the asparagus in a 10 x 6-inch baking dish. Mix together the remaining ingredients and sprinkle over the asparagus.
4. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the cheese mixture is lightly browned.
